microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's **recovery validation program** from a 2-person operation into a platformized system, standardizing audit workflows to sustain 45+ annual resilience drills and drive **$14M+ business impact** across enterprise customers.

Led 0→1 development of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining requirements and self-service scheduling capabilities that reduced operational toil by **30%** and transitioned execution to a scalable, repeatable model.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, delivering a rack-level drill program in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate**, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a new continuous-validation standard.

Built an internal AI agent restructuring planning workflows to reduce cycle time by **39%** and increase drill capacity by 21%, enabling the team to scale compliance outreach without adding headcount.
microsoft_2023: Championed **adoption of AI-driven workflows** across 14 Azure service teams, conducting user demos and training sessions that standardized quality processes and saved 37 engineering hours monthly.

Identified critical compliance gaps by facilitating **11+ structured user interviews** with Azure service teams, influencing the product roadmap to include intent-based YAML generation aligned to regulatory documentation standards.

Improved **data integrity and retrieval** by implementing rigorous metadata standards and migrating documentation to an AI-powered semantic search tool, cutting lookup time by 83% across internal audit-adjacent repositories.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched regions 28% faster by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework across 140+ teams, mirroring an internal compliance outreach model.

Conducted discovery with 20+ service teams to identify **81 hours of manual effort** per region launch, then built a roadmap to automate critical paths and reduce operational risk exposure across the program.

Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** to track operational toil across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to prioritize high-impact automation gaps and maintain program-level visibility into compliance workstreams.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot transition by defining the legacy OS migration strategy, mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations, and coordinating audit-style readiness reviews before each phase.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies including sprint planning and retrospectives, resolving **40+ high-priority tickets** to stabilize the developer intake process and maintain compliance with program delivery timelines.

Drove cross-functional alignment between IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and reducing manual quality-control steps.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by managing end-to-end scoping and invoicing for 200+ monthly proposals via a new CRM process, building stakeholder-facing documentation standards that improved audit-readiness of sales records.

Reduced Customer Acquisition Cost by **13%** and boosted conversions by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing the website and Google profile to align outreach with compliance messaging.

Improved leadership pricing models by conducting **financial profitability analysis** across 1,000+ project records to identify and seal margin leaks, delivering findings in a structured executive-facing report.
